innerBlocks.innerHTML: Questions after adding photo-led storytelling to the homepage.

innerBlocks.innerHTML: Yes. They act as visual stand-ins so the page can be designed around real photo proportions and editorial pacing before final assets are selected.
innerContent: Yes. They act as visual stand-ins so the page can be designed around real photo proportions and editorial pacing before final assets are selected.

innerBlocks.innerHTML: <details class="wp-block-details faq-panel"><summary>Are these picsum.photos images just placeholders?</summary></details>
innerContent: <details class="wp-block-details faq-panel"><summary>Are these picsum.photos images just placeholders?</summary>
</details>

innerBlocks.innerHTML: Yes. The entire homepage still lives in real Gutenberg blocks under theme content sync, including the image blocks and their URLs.
innerContent: Yes. The entire homepage still lives in real Gutenberg blocks under theme content sync, including the image blocks and their URLs.

innerBlocks.innerHTML: <details class="wp-block-details faq-panel"><summary>Does the page still stay editor-visible?</summary></details>
innerContent: <details class="wp-block-details faq-panel"><summary>Does the page still stay editor-visible?</summary>
</details>

innerBlocks.innerHTML: Absolutely. The Picsum URLs are just content values inside the image blocks, so swapping them later does not require rebuilding the layout.
innerContent: Absolutely. The Picsum URLs are just content values inside the image blocks, so swapping them later does not require rebuilding the layout.

innerBlocks.innerHTML: <details class="wp-block-details faq-panel"><summary>Can the placeholders be replaced later with real brand photography?</summary></details>
innerContent: <details class="wp-block-details faq-panel"><summary>Can the placeholders be replaced later with real brand photography?</summary>
